title: Optional KBase-Narrative Provenance for KBUtilLib's EE2 App Runner

slices.A: object-level prov_actions in save_ws_object (both KBWSUtils and KBWSUtilsImpl) + get_provenance service-field fix; canonical, ships first, opt-in via existing provenance context
slices.B: narrative audit-cell trace: record_narrative_provenance flag on run_app, submit-time narrative resolution/creation + narrative_id stamping, KBWSUtilsImpl.append_app_run_audit render-from-ledger, AppRunner.audit_callback seam

decisions.cell_format: markdown (nc flavor 2); native re-runnable app cells out of scope
decisions.narrative_scope: one per workspace; resolve explicit-ref > discover-existing > auto-create
decisions.narrative_service: dynamic resolution via existing service_wizard endpoint; no new static entry
decisions.render_seam: AppRunner.audit_callback factory -> on_progress for JobMonitor.wait_all; run_app submit-only
decisions.ordering: A first; B depends_on A to avoid kb_ws_utils.py merge conflict
